title: Volume Backup
story: Volumes must be backed up. Use a temporary container to tar the contents of `app-data` volume to `/backup/app-data.tar.gz` on the host.
objectives: Run a temporary container that mounts `app-data` at `/data` and `/backup` as a bind mount
Container should stop after completing the backup
hints: Mount both the volume and the backup directory

initialState.summary: - Volume `app-data` with files pre-created - Host directory `/backup` exists and is writable
